results.title: Tyler Wilson
highlights:
GenAI Engineer at SBA Communications
...
Analytics Engineer at [SBA Communications](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sba-communications)
...
I am an AI/ML Engineer and Software Developer with experience building intelligent systems for space exploration, aerospace, and defense applications. My background blends machine learning, full-stack development, and application security with a mission-driven focus shaped by my time supporting NASA-related projects and Army Futures Command. At NASA, I contributed to AI/ML frameworks and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines for fault detection in ISS-bound IoT devices, helping push the boundaries of autonomy and safety in space systems. Previously, at Army Futures Command, I designed and deployed software for ground autonomy platforms, developed secure full-stack web applications, and implemented containerized vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps workflows. I bring a proven ability to operate across the stack — from Python and Java development, to containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), to applied AI with PyTorch and TensorFlow. My career began in the U.S. Army as an AH64-D/E Avionics and Armament Maintainer, where I gained hands-on experience ensuring the reliability of mission-critical systems under high-stakes conditions.

...
Since 1989, SBA Communications has been a pillar of the wireless industry. Today, as a publicly traded global leader and S&P 500 company, our network of over 46,000 communication sites spans 10+ countries, forming the critical infrastructure that connects millions. We are the force behind the scenes —the essential infrastructure that keeps our world connected.
...
We are looking for innovators to join the dynamic team that makes it all possible. In an industry that moves fast, we rely on our agility to stay ahead of the curve and deliver results. - Create databases using vendor data.

- Assist with miscellaneous administrative duties within the department.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Monitored tower lighting systems using proprietary software; generated alarms, escalated issues, and supported FAA compliance by assisting with NOTAM filing. Tracked performance and alarms for microwave, DAS, wired WAN/LAN networks, tenant internet circuits, and Connected Solutions networks using Nagios for proactive monitoring. Performed incident response, including first-level troubleshooting, log analysis, and escalation to Tier II/III engineers, ensuring timely resolution of outages. Utilized NetBox documentation for accurate asset management, network inventory, and topology tracking. Oversaw facility subsystems including HVAC, UPS, generators, and electronic access control/security systems. Logged, updated, and closed trouble tickets with detailed incident documentation, ensuring traceability and compliance. Responded to incoming NOC calls from tenants, FAA, FCC, SBA operations teams, and the general public, exercising tact and professionalism. Maintained daily reports, alarm logs, and shift documentation to support smooth handovers and compliance audits. Collaborated in a 24/7 rotating schedule to ensure continuous network and facilities monitoring.

results.title: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus) - Strategic Staffing Solutions
highlights:
Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus) - Strategic Staffing Solutions
...
# Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus)
...
Job Title: Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer (Generative AI Focus)Contract Length: 12+ Months Hybrid schedule 3 days per week onsite/ 2 remoteLocation: Charlotte, NC/ Irving, TX/ Boston, MA
...
We are seeking a highly motivated Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer to build advanced analytics and Generative AI (Gen AI) solutions across multiple business functions. This role combines strong data analysis capabilities with machine learning and emerging Gen AI techniques to drive business insights, automation, and innovation.
...
The ideal candidate is hands-on, analytical, and comfortable owning the full lifecycle of data science solutions—from problem definition through model development and deployment—while collaborating closely with engineering and business stakeholders.
...
- Perform in-depth data analysis and exploration using SQL and statistical techniques to uncover patterns, solve business problems, and support data-driven decision-making.
...
- Design, develop, and implement scalable solutions using Python or Java.
...
- Utilize data science and machine learning libraries such as NumPy, SciPy, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn.
...
- Build reusable pipelines for data processing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
...
- Develop and evaluate machine learning models, including tree-based and ensemble algorithms such as Random Forest and XGBoost.
...
- Assess model performance, tune hyperparameters, and ensure models meet business and technical requirements.
...
- Apply AI-assisted techniques to enhance productivity and insights.
...
- Craft effective prompts using Gemini or similar generative AI models to support data exploration, feature generation, analysis, and summarization.
...
- Strong SQL and data analysis skills.
- Experience working with structured and semi-structured datasets.
- Proficiency in Python or Java for data science, machine learning, and analytical workloads.
- Hands-on experience with machine learning frameworks and model development.
- Experience building, training, and evaluating predictive models in production or near-production environments.
...
- Ability to work independently and own initiatives end-to-end, from problem definition and requirements gathering through solution delivery and validation.
- Experience using generative AI models to augment analytical workflows.
- Familiarity with prompt engineering.
- Experience leveraging large language models (LLMs) for automation and analytical tasks.
- Experience integrating Gen AI capabilities into analytical processes.

Generative AI Focus
...
- Develop and deploy Gen AI solutions that enhance productivity, automate workflows, and generate AI-driven business insights.
- Apply foundational knowledge of Gen AI concepts, tools, and use cases.
- Experience with large language models (LLMs), prompt engineering, or AI-assisted analytics.
- Strong interest in emerging AI technologies and a willingness to continuously learn and apply new Gen AI innovations.
...
Ideal Candidate Profile
...
- Self-driven data professional with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Combines practical machine learning expertise with emerging AI capabilities.
- Comfortable navigating ambiguous problems and translating business needs into technical solutions.
- Capable of delivering measurable business outcomes.
- Strong communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
- Passionate about applying traditional machine learning and modern Generative AI techniques to solve complex business challenges.

results.title: Sai Krishna
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer @ Charter Communications | Production ML Systems | LLMs, NLP & Deep Learning | PyTorch, Spark, AWS | Building Scalable ML Pipelines in Telecom
...
AI ML Engineer II at [Charter Communications](https://www.linkedin.com/company/charter-communications)

### AI ML Engineer II at [Charter Communications](https://www.linkedin.com/company/charter-communications) (Current)
...
- Designed and deployed a real-time network anomaly detection system using PyTorch and Apache Kafka, processing 12M+ network telemetry events per hour across Charter's HFC and fiber infrastructure, reducing mean-time-to-detect (MTTD) for service-impacting outages by 38%
...
- Built an end-to-end subscriber churn prediction pipeline on AWS SageMaker with XGBoost and gradient-boosted trees, analyzing 40+ behavioral features (usage patterns, call-center interactions, billing history) to identify at-risk Spectrum subscribers — model drove a targeted retention campaign that reduced monthly churn by 14%, saving an estimated $4.2M annually
...
- Architected a distributed feature engineering framework on Apache Spark (EMR) to compute real-time and batch features from DOCSIS 3.1 modem telemetry, CMTS logs, and CDN performance data, replacing a legacy ETL pipeline and cutting feature computation latency from 6 hours to 22 minutes
...
- Developed NLP models (fine-tuned BERT) to classify and route 200K+ monthly customer support tickets by intent and urgency, achieving 91% classification accuracy and reducing average ticket resolution time by 26% through smarter escalation workflows

...
Designed and built an end-to-end ML system to predict optimal adaptive bitrate (ABR) configurations for live video streams on Charter's Spectrum TV platform serving 15M+ subscribers. Problem: Rule-based ABR algorithms react poorly to sudden network congestion, causing rebuffering and degraded QoE during peak hours — especially during live sports with unpredictable viewership spikes. Solution: Built a lightweight LSTM-based model ingesting per-session telemetry (throughput, buffer occupancy, segment download times, RTT, CMTS utilization) to predict next 5-second network throughput with 89% accuracy. Model runs inference in under 8ms on edge nodes (Lambda@Edge), meeting hard latency constraints for real-time ABR decisions. Training pipeline processes 3TB+ of session telemetry daily on Spark (EMR), with 60+ engineered features. Distributed PyTorch training across 4 GPU instances, with Optuna for hyperparameter tuning and MLflow for experiment tracking. Deployed a shadow-mode A/B testing framework with Bayesian significance testing to validate predictions against the existing rule-based system before full rollout. Results: - 34% reduction in rebuffer events during peak hours across top 50 congested nodes - 12% improvement in average delivered video bitrate - 19% reduction in session abandonment during live sporting events - Serves 8M+ predictions/hour at p99 latency of 6.2ms Stack: PyTorch, LSTM, Spark, AWS (SageMaker, EMR, Lambda@Edge, S3, Kinesis), MLflow, Optuna, Kubernetes, Grafana, Kafka, ONNX Runtime Show less

results.title: Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI) | Hirequill
highlights:
Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI) | Hirequill
...
# Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI)
...
Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI)
...
Experience: 12–15+ Years (Data Science / AI Experience)
...
We are seeking a highly accomplished Lead Data Scientist with strong Generative AI expertise to design and drive enterprise-scale AI solutions. The ideal candidate will have deep experience in machine learning, statistical modeling, Large Language Models (LLMs), and advanced analytics, along with strong leadership capabilities to guide teams and deliver impactful AI-driven products.
...
This role requires ownership of GenAI solution design, model development, experimentation, deployment, and performance optimization across enterprise environments.
...
- Key Responsibilities
- Define and lead GenAI and data science strategy across business use cases.
- Design and implement LLM-based applications including RAG architectures.
- Lead development of machine learning models and advanced analytics solutions.
- Perform deep exploratory data analysis (EDA) and derive actionable insights.
- Architect end-to-end ML pipelines (data ingestion → training → deployment → monitoring).
- Optimize models for accuracy, scalability, and cost efficiency.
- Collaborate with Data Engineers, ML Engineers, and Product stakeholders.

results.title: Jeremy
highlights:
# Senior AI Engineer, Ads Ai
...
Senior ML engineer role designing and productionizing AI systems for LinkedIn's ad platform, with focus on generative AI, LLMs, and large-scale creative generation to improve advertiser ROI.
...
Ads AI Team Overview: Assets, Formats & Placements (AFP)
...
The AFP team defines how ad creatives are packaged and delivered across LinkedIn — evolving Assets (media, metadata, creative components), standardized Formats (single image, video, carousel, document, conversation), and Placements (feed, messaging surfaces, network apps, emerging surfaces). We partner closely with Ads AI, Measurement, and Serving to provide the schema, APIs, and delivery runtime that enable creative portability, policy compliance, and cross-surface quality — so advertisers can launch once and scale everywhere with predictable outcomes.
...
We’re seeking a Senior AI Engineer to shape the next generation of AI-powered advertising. You will design, build, and productionize ML systems powering LinkedIn’s ad platform — working end-to-end from problem formulation and data exploration to model training, evaluation, and deployment. You’ll tackle challenges at the intersection of generative AI, LLMs, and large-scale ad systems alongside PMs, data scientists, and platform engineers.
...
Develop models: Design, train, and iterate on ML/AI models (incl. LLMs and deep learning) to improve creative generation, relevance, and performance.
...
Advance generative AI: Apply text/image/video generation to create compelling ad-creative variations that improve advertiser ROI.

Design systems: Architect scalable, reliable ML pipelines and services that operate at LinkedIn scale.

# Senior AI/ML Engineer

We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.

...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
, and fairness.

- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.

- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.

Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.

Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.

...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.

Job DescriptionSavannah River National Laboratory is seeking a highly motivated and self-starting AI (artificial intelligence) and machine learning researcher to join our team in creating and maintaining large-language model research tools, especially for cybersecurity data. The successful candidate will have strong experience in Python, AI, and cybersecurity, with a focus on developing and maintaining high-quality code using unit testing, continuous integration, and deep learning models and libraries. The ideal candidate will be a solid researcher (PhD preferred), an independent worker, a good communicator, and a team player with a strong ability to write and document his or her work.Responsibilities
